stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced a significant ramp-up in Blackwell AI chip production on April 2, 2026, amid surging demand from cloud giants like MSFT and AMZN. Economic implications include accelerated AI infrastructure spending, potentially adding $100B+ to capex in 2026. Market psychology: Reinforces NVDA's AI monopoly narrative, triggering FOMO among retail and institutions. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 H100 shortage frenzy. Analogies: (1) Gold rush prospectors flocking to the best tools supplier; (2) Like Boeing in the jet age, dominating the new tech enabler.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal analyst upgrades from Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley post-announcement; X semantic search shows 85% positive sentiment (limit 20, latest mode) with viral posts on production beats, min_faves 500+.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +12% gain in 1-2 weeks on momentum; target $160
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short risky, potential -3% if delay rumors; only if overbought RSI>80
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Supply chain disruptions, US-China trade tensions, competition from AMD/TSMC.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst with strong X/news alignment and historical momentum plays.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla delayed Robotaxi unveil to October 2026 per Elon Musk tweet on April 2, citing software issues. Economic: Slows autonomy monetization, impacts EV adoption curve. Psych: Disappointment erodes hype, profit-taking. Parallels: 2020 battery day delays. Analogies: (1) Movie sequel hype deflated by postponement; (2) Like SpaceX Starship explosions delaying investor confidence.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X keyword search (query: TSLA robotaxi since:2026-04-02) shows 70% negative posts with high engagement; news on delays from Reuters, CNBC.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Limited, +3% rebound if apology tweet; hold core
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Sudden positive update from Elon, short squeeze potential.

stocks.justification: High volatility typical for TSLA, but delay news consistent across sources.

stocks.impact_theory: Palantir won $500M US DoD AI contract on April 2. Econ: Validates gov AI shift, recurring revenue boost. Psych: Meme stock revival. Parallels: 2021 gov deals. Analogies: (1) Oracle's gov cloud wins; (2) Like picking the winning horse in a defense tech race.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web search confirms contract details; X sentiment 90% bullish, top posts from influencers.

stocks.justification: Concrete contract win, strong retail sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: CrowdStrike reported a major outage affecting 30% of Fortune 500 on April 2 due to faulty update. Econ: Erodes trust in cloud security, potential lawsuits/churn. Psych: Panic selling. Parallels: 2024 outage. Analogies: (1) Like a locksmith failing during a burglary wave; (2) Airplane engine failure mid-flight.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Dominant news on outage; X posts flooded with complaints, 75% bearish.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Quick fix announcement, class action delays impact.

stocks.justification: Outage confirmed, but cyber firms resilient historically.

stocks.impact_theory: SMCI guided strong Q2 on NVDA server demand April 2. Econ: AI server bottleneck relief. Psych: Coattails on NVDA. Parallels: 2023 AI server boom. Analogies: (1) Pick-and-shovel in gold rush; (2) Like Caterpillar in infrastructure boom.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings preview positive; X hype linking to NVDA.

stocks.justification: Derivative of NVDA momentum, moderate standalone news.
